case_title: LEE KEN VS ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF MAY-14-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO DOUGLAS WENDT (ALLSTATE INS) RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE KEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,338.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY LEE KEN AS TO DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
INVALID SERVICE AS TO ALLSTATE INS, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
